name: galaxyquest-tests
description: Test tooling for GalaxyQuest frontend/unit tests

scripts.test:e2e:viewflow:seeded: pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "docker compose exec -T web php scripts/ensure_default_e2e_user.php --username=default_user --password=User!23456 --email=default_user@local.test; playwright test tests/e2e/view-flow.spec.js --reporter=line"
scripts.test:e2e:viewflow:seeded:native: pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$env:GQ_VIEWFLOW_NATIVE_ONLY='1'; docker compose exec -T web php scripts/ensure_default_e2e_user.php --username=default_user --password=User!23456 --email=default_user@local.test; playwright test tests/e2e/view-flow.spec.js --reporter=line"
scripts.test:e2e:galaxy-rotation:seeded: pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "docker compose exec -T web php scripts/ensure_default_e2e_user.php --username=default_user --password=User!23456 --email=default_user@local.test; playwright test tests/e2e/galaxy-rotation.spec.js --reporter=line"
